demo.title: qa-checklist.md
demo.code:
# Ship-blockers — do not deploy without these
# ☐ Wallet connects → shows button, not text
# ☐ Four-state flow: Connect → Network → Approve → Action
# ☐ Approve button disabled + spinner through block confirm
# ☐ Contracts verified on block explorer
# ☐ SE2 footer / tab title / README branding removed

# Should-fix before launch
# ☐ All addresses shown with <Address/> component
# ☐ USD values displayed next to every token amount
# ☐ pollingInterval: 3000 set in wagmi config
# ☐ OG image uses absolute production URL

setup: Tell your agent: "Read https://ethskills.com/qa/SKILL.md and audit this dApp"
